TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Dawka-secu ťĀďŚć°śĖĮśóŹ == Dawka-secu " Dawka-seyi a kamu Taukat, ingu a kamu: Taokas" u nganganaca u Duoke-cu, u Taywan yuncumincu nu binacadan, banacadan a ngihaan namakayda i Dipun nu sitangahay ci Yinen-ci ni kilukan tu "Taskas", Yenen-yi nakamuan, lalangawan madiput tu sipasilud i Tangabulan a binacadan. ťĀďŚć°śĖĮśóŹ(ťĀďŚć°śĖĮŤ™ě:Taukat,ŤčĪŤ™ě:Taokas), "Taokas", . likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ nay tida ku eneng i Sincu, Miwli, Taycuo a masaenalay nu dadipasan. "Duo-ke" ni kinkiwan namaka "Dawka-se". "ťĀďŚć°śĖĮ". Ciday Dawka-secuzen ku miliyas tunikalalebu a kawawan, pinaay nu binacadan a tademaw mabulaw taydan i Puli. Cincaw ciacen daw kun nina tusaay a zitayan (caysiw a seci), pasu Dawka-secu tebanay a Pinpu-cu nu bangsiaan atu binacadan a nikanengil a zitayan, tada mautang tu kunika datengan, amica kunikabulaw, nika caay tu kacelak ku binacadan, hidahida satu malawpes kina Dawka-secu labuay nu Tangabulan a lalangawan. . aydaay a Dawka-secu malataywan tu naming, kumu nuhini mala layak tu amusakamu" mihida u Miwli Huo-lun bansiaan" atu ngayngay a kamuan "mahida u Sincu Cucen bansia, Miwli Mawke bansia nu miduducay" u tadakamu nu lalumaan, nika u babalaki nu itidaay matineng musakamu tunu Taywan a nakamuan sipalamel nida ku kamu tu Dawka-seyi. . ayda nina Dawka-sezen mangalay patideng tu nuhenian, palekal tu lalangawan nuheni ayda. . kasinganganan nu likisi a kawawan ŤĎóŚźćś≠∑ŚŹ≤šļčšĽ∂ Tacia-sise' miwawies tu hulam a kawawŚ§ßÁĒ≤Ť•ŅÁ§ĺśäóśłÖšļčšĽ∂ caypic-lucay nikudan tu nu mihcaan, Dawka-secu itida ku eneng i Tacia-si bansiaan a sakakaay nu mikuwanay tu tademaw tada yadah tu kuni papisakakawawan malinges ku katuuday sa miwawies paculi, ci Linuli ku palekalay tuna sapaculiaw a kawawan,tuduhen nuheni ku Taywan-hu a kakulian, katuud kuni Patayan nuheni tu hitay, katinengan milaliw ci Cen-hu-cen. nika lingatuan tina kawawan, sakakaay nina Taywan-cen cunpin ci Li-zui-lin tumian tayda nida tayda i amis Taywan, makatengil mabilil taluma' taydan i Mawsi " aydaay nu Miwli Yunli-cen" lawaan nu Yincumin. Kilul sa, lawaan ni Li-zui-lin taydan nida i Cenha, pasayda i Tawan-hu mikilim tu sakalahitay a tademaw mangalay midebung, caay henay ka hademhem ku balucu nida. caypic-lutu mihcaan tu waluay a bulat, si sikiningay milawlaway mialaway tu Tacia-si bansian a Hu-cen sakakaay tayning nida i Taywan ci Dawni-senkay a calekakaan nida mangalay tu asikawlah, patayen nida ku limaay mihaydacuay tu belac nu "kapahay a tademaw" " Kuysun a yuncumin", pacebaan nida nina limaay a tademaw u "misalawlaway" tu Tacia basiaay a tademaw han. 1732ŚĻīŚÖęśúą, ". nina kawaw kalingesantu nu Kuysun a Yuncumin, tayda namin i Cunhau paculi miwawies, paceba han nu i pabaway, malinges ku i Tatuay a yuncumin, sisa miawda tu i Natatu bansia, Salu bansia " aydaay a Salu niyaduan", Nenma-tuo bansia " aydaay a Censuy niyaduan", Puce-li bansia " aydaay nu Taycun tunsi niyaduan, Tunsiw bansia " aydaay a Miwli Tunsiw" Ali-se bansia " aydaay a Taycun Tance niyaduan" nu sabaw nu pina a bataan nu Tangabulan a Yuncimin makaala tu tusa a malebut nu tademawan liwliwan nuhini ku Cenha, tuduhai ku micapiay nu lumaan, laliw sa tu namin kina layak maliwasak. . lisin Á•≠ŚÖł Cin-ten-ci, Dawka-sezen cukumisay u Cen-ten, tu mihcaan nu kaliwmahan nu kuyumian tu pitu a bulad sabaw tu lima a demiad katukuh tu walu a bulad sabaw tu lima a demiad sikawaw, binacadan misanga tu sakay pilisinan a payapay a cacay a bulad misangan, tanayu' han makaala tu enem, pitu a kunce nu talakaw, tatulu kina mikapetay tu hata " issama" pilisinan han apaen nuheni miliwliw muculil, nina mikapetay tu payapayan kanca idaw ku tatusaay nu mipadangay mikapet tu payapayan a tademaw, " sakay tuas a payapay" mahida u talakaway ku tuas anipisinciaan, palutatenga kina binacadan anu maluyuh a laecu ku wenmi sa. . sakay udad a lisin, nai ku tada demiad a misalisin, uyda a cacay anu makelah kiya sikawaw tina lisinan, u wayway nu Dawka-secu nu laylay a kawawan, uyni a kawaan inai' i nacudadan ni kilukan. Á•ąťõ®Á•≠: .
S.PHON: == dawka-s…ô ¶u **** == dawka-s…ô ¶u " dawka-s…ôi a kamu taukat, iŇču a kamu: taokas" u ŇčaŇčana ¶a u duok…ô- ¶u, u tajwan jun ¶umin ¶u nu bina ¶adan, bana ¶adan a Ňčińßaan namakajda i dipun nu sitaŇčańßaj ¶i jin…ôn- ¶i ni kir~…ĺukan tu "taskas", j…ôn…ôn-ji nakamuan, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan madiput tu sipasir~…ĺud i taŇčabur~…ĺan a bina ¶adan. ****(****:taukat,**:taokas), "taokas", . r~…ĺikisi ** naj tida ku …ôn…ôŇč i sin ¶u, miwr~…ĺi, taj ¶uo a masa…ônar~…ĺaj nu dadipasan. "duo-k…ô" ni kinkiwan namaka "dawka-s…ô". "***". ¶idaj dawka-s…ô ¶uz…ôn ku mir~…ĺijas tunikar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu a kawawan, pinaaj nu bina ¶adan a tad…ômaw mabur~…ĺaw tajdan i pur~…ĺi. ¶in ¶aw ¶ia ¶…ôn daw kun nina tusaaj a zitajan ( ¶ajsiw a s…ô ¶i), pasu dawka-s…ô ¶u t…ôbanaj a pinpu- ¶u nu baŇčsiaan atu bina ¶adan a nikan…ôŇčir~…ĺ a zitajan, tada mautaŇč tu kunika dat…ôŇčan, ami ¶a kunikabur~…ĺaw, nika ¶aaj tu ka ¶…ôr~…ĺak ku bina ¶adan, ńßidańßida satu mar~…ĺawp…ôs kina dawka-s…ô ¶u r~…ĺabuaj nu taŇčabur~…ĺan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. . ajdaaj a dawka-s…ô ¶u mar~…ĺatajwan tu namiŇč, kumu nuńßini mar~…ĺa r~…ĺajak tu amusakamu" mińßida u miwr~…ĺi ńßuo-r~…ĺun bansiaan" atu ŇčajŇčaj a kamuan "mańßida u sin ¶u ¶u ¶…ôn bansia, miwr~…ĺi mawk…ô bansia nu midudu ¶aj" u tadakamu nu r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan, nika u babar~…ĺaki nu itidaaj matin…ôŇč musakamu tunu tajwan a nakamuan sipar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ nida ku kamu tu dawka-s…ôi. . ajda nina dawka-s…ôz…ôn maŇčar~…ĺaj patid…ôŇč tu nuńß…ônian, par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nuńß…ôni ajda. . kasiŇčaŇčanan nu r~…ĺikisi a kawawan ****** ta ¶ia-sis…ô Ē~ ° miwawi…ôs tu ńßur~…ĺam a kawaw******** ¶ajpi ¶-r~…ĺu ¶aj nikudan tu nu mińß ¶aan, dawka-s…ô ¶u itida ku …ôn…ôŇč i ta ¶ia-si bansiaan a sakakaaj nu mikuwanaj tu tad…ômaw tada jadańß tu kuni papisakakawawan mar~…ĺiŇč…ôs ku katuudaj sa miwawi…ôs pa ¶ur~…ĺi, ¶i r~…ĺinur~…ĺi ku par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺaj tuna sapa ¶ur~…ĺiaw a kawawan,tuduńß…ôn nuńß…ôni ku tajwan-ńßu a kakur~…ĺian, katuud kuni patajan nuńß…ôni tu ńßitaj, katin…ôŇčan mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw ¶i ¶…ôn-ńßu- ¶…ôn. nika r~…ĺiŇčatuan tina kawawan, sakakaaj nina tajwan- ¶…ôn ¶unpin ¶i r~…ĺi-zui-r~…ĺin tumian tajda nida tajda i amis tajwan, makat…ôŇčir~…ĺ mabir~…ĺir~…ĺ tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tajdan i mawsi " ajdaaj nu miwr~…ĺi junr~…ĺi- ¶…ôn" r~…ĺawaan nu jin ¶umin. kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa, r~…ĺawaan ni r~…ĺi-zui-r~…ĺin tajdan nida i ¶…ônńßa, pasajda i tawan-ńßu mikir~…ĺim tu sakar~…ĺańßitaj a tad…ômaw maŇčar~…ĺaj mid…ôbuŇč, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka ńßad…ômńß…ôm ku bar~…ĺu ¶u nida. ¶ajpi ¶-r~…ĺutu mińß ¶aan tu war~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺat, si sikiniŇčaj mir~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj miar~…ĺawaj tu ta ¶ia-si bansian a ńßu- ¶…ôn sakakaaj tajniŇč nida i tajwan ¶i dawni-s…ônkaj a ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkakaan nida maŇčar~…ĺaj tu asikawr~…ĺańß, pataj…ôn nida ku r~…ĺimaaj mińßajda ¶uaj tu b…ôr~…ĺa ¶ nu "kapańßaj a tad…ômaw" " kujsun a jun ¶umin", pa ¶…ôbaan nida nina r~…ĺimaaj a tad…ômaw u "misar~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj" tu ta ¶ia basiaaj a tad…ômaw ńßan. *******, ". nina kawaw kar~…ĺiŇč…ôsantu nu kujsun a jun ¶umin, tajda namin i ¶unńßau pa ¶ur~…ĺi miwawi…ôs, pa ¶…ôba ńßan nu i pabawaj, mar~…ĺiŇč…ôs ku i tatuaj a jun ¶umin, sisa miawda tu i natatu bansia, sar~…ĺu bansia " ajdaaj a sar~…ĺu nijaduan", n…ônma-tuo bansia " ajdaaj a ¶…ônsuj nijaduan", pu ¶…ô-r~…ĺi bansia " ajdaaj nu taj ¶un tunsi nijaduan, tunsiw bansia " ajdaaj a miwr~…ĺi tunsiw" ar~…ĺi-s…ô bansia " ajdaaj a taj ¶un tan ¶…ô nijaduan" nu sabaw nu pina a bataan nu taŇčabur~…ĺan a jun ¶imin makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut nu tad…ômawan r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwan nuńßini ku ¶…ônńßa, tuduńßai ku mi ¶apiaj nu r~…ĺumaan, r~…ĺar~…ĺiw sa tu namin kina r~…ĺajak mar~…ĺiwasak. . r~…ĺisin ** ¶in-t…ôn- ¶i, dawka-s…ôz…ôn ¶ukumisaj u ¶…ôn-t…ôn, tu mińß ¶aan nu kar~…ĺiwmańßan nu kujumian tu pitu a bur~…ĺad sabaw tu r~…ĺima a d…ômiad katukuńß tu war~…ĺu a bur~…ĺad sabaw tu r~…ĺima a d…ômiad sikawaw, bina ¶adan misaŇča tu sakaj pir~…ĺisinan a pajapaj a ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad misaŇčan, tanaju Ē~ ° ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu …ôn…ôm, pitu a kun ¶…ô nu tar~…ĺakaw, tatur~…ĺu kina mikap…ôtaj tu ńßata " issama" pir~…ĺisinan ńßan apa…ôn nuńß…ôni mir~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, nina mikap…ôtaj tu pajapajan kan ¶a idaw ku tatusaaj nu mipadaŇčaj mikap…ôt tu pajapajan a tad…ômaw, " sakaj tuas a pajapaj" mańßida u tar~…ĺakawaj ku tuas anipisin ¶iaan, par~…ĺutat…ôŇča kina bina ¶adan anu mar~…ĺujuńß a r~…ĺa…ô ¶u ku w…ônmi sa. . sakaj udad a r~…ĺisin, nai ku tada d…ômiad a misar~…ĺisin, ujda a ¶a ¶aj anu mak…ôr~…ĺańß kija sikawaw tina r~…ĺisinan, u wajwaj nu dawka-s…ô ¶u nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj a kawawan, ujni a kawaan inai Ē~ ° i na ¶udadan ni kir~…ĺukan. ***: .
S.FORM: == Dawka-secu ťĀďŚć°śĖĮśóŹ == Dawka-secu " Dawka-seyi a kamu Taukat, ingu a kamu: Taokas" u nganganaca u Duoke-cu, u Taywan yuncumincu nu binacadan, banacadan a ngihaan namakayda i Dipun nu sitangahay ci Yinen-ci ni kilukan tu "Taskas", Yenen-yi nakamuan, lalangawan madiput tu sipasilud i Tangabulan a binacadan. ťĀďŚć°śĖĮśóŹ(ťĀďŚć°śĖĮŤ™ě:Taukat,ŤčĪŤ™ě:Taokas), "Taokas", . likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ nay tida ku eneng i Sincu, Miwli, Taycuo a masaenalay nu dadipasan. "Duo-ke" ni kinkiwan namaka "Dawka-se". "ťĀďŚć°śĖĮ". Ciday Dawka-secuzen ku miliyas tunikalalebu a kawawan, pinaay nu binacadan a tademaw mabulaw taydan i Puli. Cincaw ciacen daw kun nina tusaay a zitayan (caysiw a seci), pasu Dawka-secu tebanay a Pinpu-cu nu bangsiaan atu binacadan a nikanengil a zitayan, tada mautang tu kunika datengan, amica kunikabulaw, nika caay tu kacelak ku binacadan, hidahida satu malawpes kina Dawka-secu labuay nu Tangabulan a lalangawan. . aydaay a Dawka-secu malataywan tu naming, kumu nuhini mala layak tu amusakamu" mihida u Miwli Huo-lun bansiaan" atu ngayngay a kamuan "mahida u Sincu Cucen bansia, Miwli Mawke bansia nu miduducay" u tadakamu nu lalumaan, nika u babalaki nu itidaay matineng musakamu tunu Taywan a nakamuan sipalamel nida ku kamu tu Dawka-seyi. . ayda nina Dawka-sezen mangalay patideng tu nuhenian, palekal tu lalangawan nuheni ayda. . kasinganganan nu likisi a kawawan ŤĎóŚźćś≠∑ŚŹ≤šļčšĽ∂ Tacia-sise' miwawies tu hulam a kawawŚ§ßÁĒ≤Ť•ŅÁ§ĺśäóśłÖšļčšĽ∂ caypic-lucay nikudan tu nu mihcaan, Dawka-secu itida ku eneng i Tacia-si bansiaan a sakakaay nu mikuwanay tu tademaw tada yadah tu kuni papisakakawawan malinges ku katuuday sa miwawies paculi, ci Linuli ku palekalay tuna sapaculiaw a kawawan,tuduhen nuheni ku Taywan-hu a kakulian, katuud kuni Patayan nuheni tu hitay, katinengan milaliw ci Cen-hu-cen. nika lingatuan tina kawawan, sakakaay nina Taywan-cen cunpin ci Li-zui-lin tumian tayda nida tayda i amis Taywan, makatengil mabilil taluma' taydan i Mawsi " aydaay nu Miwli Yunli-cen" lawaan nu Yincumin. Kilul sa, lawaan ni Li-zui-lin taydan nida i Cenha, pasayda i Tawan-hu mikilim tu sakalahitay a tademaw mangalay midebung, caay henay ka hademhem ku balucu nida. caypic-lutu mihcaan tu waluay a bulat, si sikiningay milawlaway mialaway tu Tacia-si bansian a Hu-cen sakakaay tayning nida i Taywan ci Dawni-senkay a calekakaan nida mangalay tu asikawlah, patayen nida ku limaay mihaydacuay tu belac nu "kapahay a tademaw" " Kuysun a yuncumin", pacebaan nida nina limaay a tademaw u "misalawlaway" tu Tacia basiaay a tademaw han. 1732ŚĻīŚÖęśúą, ". nina kawaw kalingesantu nu Kuysun a Yuncumin, tayda namin i Cunhau paculi miwawies, paceba han nu i pabaway, malinges ku i Tatuay a yuncumin, sisa miawda tu i Natatu bansia, Salu bansia " aydaay a Salu niyaduan", Nenma-tuo bansia " aydaay a Censuy niyaduan", Puce-li bansia " aydaay nu Taycun tunsi niyaduan, Tunsiw bansia " aydaay a Miwli Tunsiw" Ali-se bansia " aydaay a Taycun Tance niyaduan" nu sabaw nu pina a bataan nu Tangabulan a Yuncimin makaala tu tusa a malebut nu tademawan liwliwan nuhini ku Cenha, tuduhai ku micapiay nu lumaan, laliw sa tu namin kina layak maliwasak. . lisin Á•≠ŚÖł Cin-ten-ci, Dawka-sezen cukumisay u Cen-ten, tu mihcaan nu kaliwmahan nu kuyumian tu pitu a bulad sabaw tu lima a demiad katukuh tu walu a bulad sabaw tu lima a demiad sikawaw, binacadan misanga tu sakay pilisinan a payapay a cacay a bulad misangan, tanayu' han makaala tu enem, pitu a kunce nu talakaw, tatulu kina mikapetay tu hata " issama" pilisinan han apaen nuheni miliwliw muculil, nina mikapetay tu payapayan kanca idaw ku tatusaay nu mipadangay mikapet tu payapayan a tademaw, " sakay tuas a payapay" mahida u talakaway ku tuas anipisinciaan, palutatenga kina binacadan anu maluyuh a laecu ku wenmi sa. . sakay udad a lisin, nai ku tada demiad a misalisin, uyda a cacay anu makelah kiya sikawaw tina lisinan, u wayway nu Dawka-secu nu laylay a kawawan, uyni a kawaan inai' i nacudadan ni kilukan. Á•ąťõ®Á•≠: .
S.PHON: == dawka-s…ô ¶u **** == dawka-s…ô ¶u " dawka-s…ôi a kamu taukat, iŇču a kamu: taokas" u ŇčaŇčana ¶a u duok…ô- ¶u, u tajwan jun ¶umin ¶u nu bina ¶adan, bana ¶adan a Ňčińßaan namakajda i dipun nu sitaŇčańßaj ¶i jin…ôn- ¶i ni kir~…ĺukan tu "taskas", j…ôn…ôn-ji nakamuan, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan madiput tu sipasir~…ĺud i taŇčabur~…ĺan a bina ¶adan. ****(****:taukat,**:taokas), "taokas", . r~…ĺikisi ** naj tida ku …ôn…ôŇč i sin ¶u, miwr~…ĺi, taj ¶uo a masa…ônar~…ĺaj nu dadipasan. "duo-k…ô" ni kinkiwan namaka "dawka-s…ô". "***". ¶idaj dawka-s…ô ¶uz…ôn ku mir~…ĺijas tunikar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu a kawawan, pinaaj nu bina ¶adan a tad…ômaw mabur~…ĺaw tajdan i pur~…ĺi. ¶in ¶aw ¶ia ¶…ôn daw kun nina tusaaj a zitajan ( ¶ajsiw a s…ô ¶i), pasu dawka-s…ô ¶u t…ôbanaj a pinpu- ¶u nu baŇčsiaan atu bina ¶adan a nikan…ôŇčir~…ĺ a zitajan, tada mautaŇč tu kunika dat…ôŇčan, ami ¶a kunikabur~…ĺaw, nika ¶aaj tu ka ¶…ôr~…ĺak ku bina ¶adan, ńßidańßida satu mar~…ĺawp…ôs kina dawka-s…ô ¶u r~…ĺabuaj nu taŇčabur~…ĺan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. . ajdaaj a dawka-s…ô ¶u mar~…ĺatajwan tu namiŇč, kumu nuńßini mar~…ĺa r~…ĺajak tu amusakamu" mińßida u miwr~…ĺi ńßuo-r~…ĺun bansiaan" atu ŇčajŇčaj a kamuan "mańßida u sin ¶u ¶u ¶…ôn bansia, miwr~…ĺi mawk…ô bansia nu midudu ¶aj" u tadakamu nu r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan, nika u babar~…ĺaki nu itidaaj matin…ôŇč musakamu tunu tajwan a nakamuan sipar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ nida ku kamu tu dawka-s…ôi. . ajda nina dawka-s…ôz…ôn maŇčar~…ĺaj patid…ôŇč tu nuńß…ônian, par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nuńß…ôni ajda. . kasiŇčaŇčanan nu r~…ĺikisi a kawawan ****** ta ¶ia-sis…ô Ē~ ° miwawi…ôs tu ńßur~…ĺam a kawaw******** ¶ajpi ¶-r~…ĺu ¶aj nikudan tu nu mińß ¶aan, dawka-s…ô ¶u itida ku …ôn…ôŇč i ta ¶ia-si bansiaan a sakakaaj nu mikuwanaj tu tad…ômaw tada jadańß tu kuni papisakakawawan mar~…ĺiŇč…ôs ku katuudaj sa miwawi…ôs pa ¶ur~…ĺi, ¶i r~…ĺinur~…ĺi ku par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺaj tuna sapa ¶ur~…ĺiaw a kawawan,tuduńß…ôn nuńß…ôni ku tajwan-ńßu a kakur~…ĺian, katuud kuni patajan nuńß…ôni tu ńßitaj, katin…ôŇčan mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw ¶i ¶…ôn-ńßu- ¶…ôn. nika r~…ĺiŇčatuan tina kawawan, sakakaaj nina tajwan- ¶…ôn ¶unpin ¶i r~…ĺi-zui-r~…ĺin tumian tajda nida tajda i amis tajwan, makat…ôŇčir~…ĺ mabir~…ĺir~…ĺ tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tajdan i mawsi " ajdaaj nu miwr~…ĺi junr~…ĺi- ¶…ôn" r~…ĺawaan nu jin ¶umin. kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa, r~…ĺawaan ni r~…ĺi-zui-r~…ĺin tajdan nida i ¶…ônńßa, pasajda i tawan-ńßu mikir~…ĺim tu sakar~…ĺańßitaj a tad…ômaw maŇčar~…ĺaj mid…ôbuŇč, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka ńßad…ômńß…ôm ku bar~…ĺu ¶u nida. ¶ajpi ¶-r~…ĺutu mińß ¶aan tu war~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺat, si sikiniŇčaj mir~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj miar~…ĺawaj tu ta ¶ia-si bansian a ńßu- ¶…ôn sakakaaj tajniŇč nida i tajwan ¶i dawni-s…ônkaj a ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkakaan nida maŇčar~…ĺaj tu asikawr~…ĺańß, pataj…ôn nida ku r~…ĺimaaj mińßajda ¶uaj tu b…ôr~…ĺa ¶ nu "kapańßaj a tad…ômaw" " kujsun a jun ¶umin", pa ¶…ôbaan nida nina r~…ĺimaaj a tad…ômaw u "misar~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj" tu ta ¶ia basiaaj a tad…ômaw ńßan. *******, ". nina kawaw kar~…ĺiŇč…ôsantu nu kujsun a jun ¶umin, tajda namin i ¶unńßau pa ¶ur~…ĺi miwawi…ôs, pa ¶…ôba ńßan nu i pabawaj, mar~…ĺiŇč…ôs ku i tatuaj a jun ¶umin, sisa miawda tu i natatu bansia, sar~…ĺu bansia " ajdaaj a sar~…ĺu nijaduan", n…ônma-tuo bansia " ajdaaj a ¶…ônsuj nijaduan", pu ¶…ô-r~…ĺi bansia " ajdaaj nu taj ¶un tunsi nijaduan, tunsiw bansia " ajdaaj a miwr~…ĺi tunsiw" ar~…ĺi-s…ô bansia " ajdaaj a taj ¶un tan ¶…ô nijaduan" nu sabaw nu pina a bataan nu taŇčabur~…ĺan a jun ¶imin makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut nu tad…ômawan r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwan nuńßini ku ¶…ônńßa, tuduńßai ku mi ¶apiaj nu r~…ĺumaan, r~…ĺar~…ĺiw sa tu namin kina r~…ĺajak mar~…ĺiwasak. . r~…ĺisin ** ¶in-t…ôn- ¶i, dawka-s…ôz…ôn ¶ukumisaj u ¶…ôn-t…ôn, tu mińß ¶aan nu kar~…ĺiwmańßan nu kujumian tu pitu a bur~…ĺad sabaw tu r~…ĺima a d…ômiad katukuńß tu war~…ĺu a bur~…ĺad sabaw tu r~…ĺima a d…ômiad sikawaw, bina ¶adan misaŇča tu sakaj pir~…ĺisinan a pajapaj a ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad misaŇčan, tanaju Ē~ ° ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu …ôn…ôm, pitu a kun ¶…ô nu tar~…ĺakaw, tatur~…ĺu kina mikap…ôtaj tu ńßata " issama" pir~…ĺisinan ńßan apa…ôn nuńß…ôni mir~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, nina mikap…ôtaj tu pajapajan kan ¶a idaw ku tatusaaj nu mipadaŇčaj mikap…ôt tu pajapajan a tad…ômaw, " sakaj tuas a pajapaj" mańßida u tar~…ĺakawaj ku tuas anipisin ¶iaan, par~…ĺutat…ôŇča kina bina ¶adan anu mar~…ĺujuńß a r~…ĺa…ô ¶u ku w…ônmi sa. . sakaj udad a r~…ĺisin, nai ku tada d…ômiad a misar~…ĺisin, ujda a ¶a ¶aj anu mak…ôr~…ĺańß kija sikawaw tina r~…ĺisinan, u wajwaj nu dawka-s…ô ¶u nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj a kawawan, ujni a kawaan inai Ē~ ° i na ¶udadan ni kir~…ĺukan. ***: .
